log: === ROUND 1 ===

→ Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician: FAIL! 33 cold damage + .
→ 1/1 targets affected.
--- Metallic Dragonborn — Bardic Musician's turn ---

→ Archmage: WIS save [d20(ADV):11+6=17 vs DC 16] SUCCESS. Resists. (had advantage)
→ No targets affected. Spell wasted.

Archmage is incapacitated — skipping turn.
